description: Intent-anchored eval scenarios for the Trello connector arranged on the setup spectrum (arrange-act / discover-act / act-only) so a 3-arm run reveals native's capability profile; outcome assertions grade all arms, mechanism assertions our-arm-only. {{run_id}} namespaces created assets. Run per the agentskills.io eval methodology.

evals.description: Coverage probe: create a board + list, add a card, then archive it.

steps.intent: Create a board named 'Eval board {{run_id}}'.

outcome: A board named 'Eval board {{run_id}}' now exists and its id is reported.
mechanism: Uses a single create-board call; the board id comes from the create result, not a hard-coded id.

steps.intent: On the board you just created, add a list named 'To Do {{run_id}}'.

outcome: A list named 'To Do {{run_id}}' now exists on that board and its id is reported.
mechanism: Creates the list on the board id from this session rather than inventing a board id.

steps.intent: Create a card named 'Task {{run_id}}' on the list you just created.

outcome: A card titled 'Task {{run_id}}' now exists on that list and its id is reported.
mechanism: Resolves the list id from this session before creating the card rather than guessing an idList.

steps.intent: Archive the card you just created.

outcome: The 'Task {{run_id}}' card is archived (closed).
mechanism: Archives the card id created in this session rather than a different or invented id.

evals.description: Create two lists, add a card, move it, verify destination list.

steps.intent: Create a board 'Move test {{run_id}}' with two lists: 'Source {{run_id}}' and 'Done {{run_id}}'.

outcome: A board and two lists with those exact names now exist; ids are reported.
mechanism: Creates the board before lists and uses returned ids rather than inventing list ids.

steps.intent: Add a card 'Movable {{run_id}}' to the 'Source {{run_id}}' list.

outcome: A card 'Movable {{run_id}}' exists on the source list and its id is reported.
mechanism: Targets the source list by name or id from this session, not a hard-coded idList.

steps.intent: Move the card to the 'Done {{run_id}}' list.

outcome: The card now belongs to the 'Done {{run_id}}' list.
mechanism: Moves the card created in this session using a destination list id resolved from this session.

evals.description: Create a card and add a comment.

steps.intent: Create a board 'Comment test {{run_id}}', a list 'Inbox {{run_id}}', and a card 'Discuss {{run_id}}' on that list.

outcome: The card 'Discuss {{run_id}}' exists and its id is reported.
mechanism: Builds board → list → card in order using ids from each create result.

steps.intent: Add the comment 'Ship by Friday {{run_id}}' to that card.

outcome: The comment text appears on the card (as an action or in the card's activity).
mechanism: Comments on the card id from this session rather than inventing a card id.

evals.description: Checklist create → add item → mark complete.

steps.intent: Create a board 'Checklist {{run_id}}', list 'Tasks {{run_id}}', and card 'Prep {{run_id}}'.

outcome: The card 'Prep {{run_id}}' exists with a reported id.
mechanism: Creates prerequisite board/list/card using returned ids.

steps.intent: Add a checklist named 'Steps {{run_id}}' to that card with one item 'Review docs {{run_id}}'.

outcome: A checklist 'Steps {{run_id}}' with item 'Review docs {{run_id}}' exists; item id is reported.
mechanism: Creates checklist and item on the card from this session.

steps.intent: Mark 'Review docs {{run_id}}' complete.

outcome: The checklist item is marked complete (state true).
mechanism: Updates the checklist item id from this session, not an invented id.

evals.description: Create board label, attach to card.

steps.intent: Create board 'Labels {{run_id}}', list 'Queue {{run_id}}', card 'Tagged {{run_id}}', and a red label named 'Urgent {{run_id}}' on that board.

outcome: Board, list, card, and label all exist with reported ids.
mechanism: Creates the label on the same board as the card before attaching.

steps.intent: Add the 'Urgent {{run_id}}' label to the card.

outcome: The card now has the urgent label applied.
mechanism: Uses the label id created in this session rather than guessing a label id.

evals.description: Guidance-dependent: resolve list by name before creating a card.

steps.intent: Create board 'Find list {{run_id}}' with list 'Backlog {{run_id}}'.

outcome: Board and list exist with reported ids.
mechanism: Creates board then list using returned ids.

steps.intent: Find lists on that board whose name contains 'Backlog {{run_id}}'.

outcome: At least one list matching 'Backlog {{run_id}}' is returned with an id.
mechanism: Searches lists on the board from this session rather than inventing a board id.

steps.intent: Create card 'From find {{run_id}}' on the matching list.

outcome: Card 'From find {{run_id}}' exists on the Backlog list.
mechanism: Uses a list id from the find result in this session, not a guessed idList.

evals.description: Create a uniquely named card then search for it.

steps.intent: Create board 'Search {{run_id}}', list 'All {{run_id}}', and card 'Unique needle {{run_id}}'.

outcome: The card 'Unique needle {{run_id}}' exists.
mechanism: Creates prerequisites before searching.

steps.intent: Search for cards matching 'Unique needle {{run_id}}'.

outcome: The search returns the card titled 'Unique needle {{run_id}}'.
mechanism: Uses the search tool with the given title rather than listing every board manually without need.

evals.description: Set a due date on an existing card.

steps.intent: Create board 'Due {{run_id}}', list 'Work {{run_id}}', and card 'Deadline {{run_id}}'.

outcome: Card 'Deadline {{run_id}}' exists with a reported id.
mechanism: Creates prerequisites using returned ids.

steps.intent: Set the card's due date to 2026-12-31T17:00:00.000Z.

outcome: The card now has the specified due date.
mechanism: Updates the card id from this session with a proper ISO due field.

evals.description: Read-only: list boards the member can access.

steps.intent: List the Trello boards I can access.

outcome: A list of boards is returned (possibly empty) with id and name fields.
mechanism: Uses a list-boards style read call rather than inventing board data.

steps.intent: Who is the authenticated Trello member?

outcome: The response includes member id and a display name or username.
mechanism: Calls the current-member tool rather than guessing a member id.

evals.description: Copy an existing board with a new name.

steps.intent: Create a board named 'Original {{run_id}}'.

outcome: Board 'Original {{run_id}}' exists with a reported id.
mechanism: Uses create-board; id comes from the result.

steps.intent: Copy that board to a new board named 'Copy of {{run_id}}' without keeping cards.

outcome: A second board named 'Copy of {{run_id}}' now exists.
mechanism: Copies the source board id from this session rather than inventing a source id.

evals.description: Archive a board after creating it.

steps.intent: Create a board 'Temporary {{run_id}}'.

outcome: Board exists with a reported id.
mechanism: Creates board; id from result.

steps.intent: Archive (close) that board.

outcome: The board is closed/archived.
mechanism: Closes the board id from this session.

evals.description: Disambiguation: two lists with the same name should prompt clarification before writing.

steps.intent: Create board 'Dup lists {{run_id}}' with two lists both named 'Inbox'.

outcome: Two lists named 'Inbox' exist on the board.
mechanism: Creates two distinct lists on the same board.

steps.intent: Add a card 'Ambiguous {{run_id}}' to the Inbox list.

outcome: If two Inbox lists tie, the agent asks which one rather than picking arbitrarily; if it proceeds, the card lands on exactly one list.
mechanism: Does not silently pick among multiple exact name matches without disambiguation when both are present.

evals.description: Graceful refusal: webhooks are out of scope.

steps.intent: Register a Trello webhook that fires when any card moves on my board.

outcome: The agent states webhook setup is not supported by this connector and does not claim success.
mechanism: Does not call unrelated tools to simulate webhook registration.

evals.description: Graceful refusal: local binary upload is out of scope.

steps.intent: Upload /tmp/report.pdf from my machine as an attachment on card 604a45a4087d070014a2b5f5.

outcome: The agent explains local file upload is not supported (URL attachments only) and does not fabricate a successful upload.
mechanism: Does not pretend a URL attachment call succeeded for a local path.

evals.description: Read custom field definitions before setting values.

steps.intent: Create a board 'Custom fields {{run_id}}'.

outcome: Board exists with a reported id.
mechanism: Creates board; id from result.

steps.intent: List custom field definitions on that board.

outcome: Custom field definitions are returned (possibly an empty list).
mechanism: Lists custom fields for the board id from this session.
